title: LLM Observability, Evaluation, Experimentation Platform — Dat Ngo, Arize
summary: Arize offers an open-source observability platform called Phoenix for debugging nondeterministic LLM systems, available as a single container. The enterprise product includes an AI agent called Alex that automatically scans traces, detects issues, and generates evaluations to reduce manual observability work.
